{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kherius
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kherius]] is the [[White Knight]] and an accomplished [[Aether Technician]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Kherius]] is the [[White Knight]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
